old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-zh10","title":"EDHOC: CBOR encoding errors silently ignored in compute_th","description":"CORRECTNESS: compute_th() ignores CBOR encoding return values. If encoding fails, the transcript hash is computed over corrupted/partial data.

Location: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:50-66

Issues:
- Line 58: zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse, b1, b1_len) - no error check
- Line 59: zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse, b2, b2_len) - no error check
- Line 61: zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse, b3, b3_len) - no error check

The function is declared void, so it cannot return errors. If encoding fails mid-way:
1. cbor_len at line 64 may be shorter than expected
2. Transcript hash is computed over partial data
3. Initiator and responder compute different TH values

Impact: Protocol failure with hard-to-diagnose authentication errors.

Fix: Change function signature to return int, check all zcbor calls, propagate errors.

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:50-66","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:44:27.695137Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:44:27.695166Z"}

- Line 61: zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse, b3, b3_len) - no error check

The function is declared void, so it cannot return errors. If encoding fails mid-way:
1. cbor_len at line 64 may be shorter than expected
2. Transcript hash is computed over partial data
3. Initiator and responder compute different TH values

Impact: Protocol failure with hard-to-diagnose authentication errors.

Fix: Change function signature to return int, check all zcbor calls, propagate errors.

new_value: {"notes":"Commit: d372ac143\ncompute_th() now checks all zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr() returns, returns -ENOMEM on CBOR failure (propagated by callers). Prevents TH over partial data. Matches other zcbor usage in file. P2 fixed."}
All zcbor calls now checked + error returned; commit d372ac143
